teamComposition.title: Team composition (placeholder)
bullets: Replace this block with your league rules: squad size, overseas cap, role minimums, etc.
You can paste the same text your group agrees on - it renders as readable sections below.

scoring.title: Fantasy scoring (placeholder)
scoring.footer: When you send your real scoring table, we will mirror it here. After each match, open the match on Cricbuzz, note each relevant stat for your players, and add a byMatch row plus update seasonTotal in players.json.
